title: VimFu — Ctrl-F
description: Ctrl-F scrolls one full page forward (down). Same as Page Down. Paired with Ctrl-B for full-page navigation.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Control F scrolls one full page forward. That means down.
We're at the top. Press control F.
One full page down. We jumped past the Room class into the Player class.
Bottom of the file. Two presses and we've read everything.
Control B goes the other way. Backward, meaning up.
F for forward, B for backward. Full page at a time.
Control F. Page down. Fast scrolling through long files.
